_meta.purpose: Stub for the complete official municipality (община) list for Bulgaria, for deterministic source discovery — mirrors the shape of data/catalog/municipalities-at.json. NOT populated yet: this file only carries the header/shape + a couple of hand-filled example rows so the ingest scripts (register-probed.mjs-equivalent, seed.mjs) have something to validate against. Grok fills in all 265 rows per docs/playbooks/country-mining-playbook.md + briefs/bulgaria-grok-kit.md.
_meta.official_source: National Statistical Institute (NSI) of Bulgaria — 'Administrative-territorial and territorial division of the Republic of Bulgaria', as of 31 December 2025: https://www.nsi.bg/en/press-release/administrative-territorial-and-territorial-division-of-the-republic-of-bulgaria-9010
_meta.note_on_count: 265 общини (municipalities) grouped into 28 области (districts/oblasts), which in turn aggregate into 6 NUTS-2 statistical regions. 'region' in each row below should be the област (district), matching the district/region tier used throughout this catalog and in sources.region.

row_shape.name: string — official Bulgarian name (Cyrillic, as published by NSI/the municipality itself — never transliterate)
row_shape.website: string|null — official municipality (община) website if known, else null (prober guesses canonical patterns)
row_shape.population_tier: optional, if useful for prioritization — not required
